mission.title: strimzi: Support mounting a volume to the pod
mission.description: Support mounting a volume to the pod. Requested by 5+ users.

steps.title: Check current strimzi deployment
steps.description:
Verify your strimzi version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n strimzi -l app.kubernetes.io/name=strimzi
helm list -n strimzi 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working strimzi installation.

steps.title: Review strimzi configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant strimzi configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n strimzi -l app.kubernetes.io/name=strimzi
kubectl get configmap -n strimzi -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=strimzi
```
When analyzing out-of-memory problems happening in JVM, it helps to collect and look at the heap dump (see [DBZ-1104](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/DBZ-1104) for the reference).

steps.title: Apply the fix for Support mounting a volume to the pod
steps.description:
This PR introduces enhancements to the Strim
```yaml
storage:
      type: persistent-claim
      size: 1Gi
      class: rook-cephfs
      deleteClaim: false
      mountPath: /mnt/shared
    template:
      pod:
        securityContext:
          runAsNonRoot: false
          fsGroup: 1001
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n strimzi -l app.kubernetes.io/name=strimzi
kubectl get events -n strimzi --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Support mounting a volume to the pod" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: See the linked issue and PR for the community-verified solution.
codeSnippets:
storage:
      type: persistent-claim
      size: 1Gi
      class: rook-cephfs
      deleteClaim: false
      mountPath: /mnt/shared
    template:
      pod:
        securityContext:
          runAsNonRoot: false
          fsGroup: 1001

$ kubectl get pvc
    NAME                               STATUS   VOLUME                                     CAPACITY   ACCESS MODES   STORAGECLASS   AGE
    data-odf-cluster-kafka-0           Bound    pvc-7a09ed64-2216-48fa-b040-65ecec708472   2Gi        RWO            local-path     143m
    data-odf-cluster-kafka-1           Bound    pvc-4385d70e-da6a-4ed5-b52b-527ae2ea4feb   2Gi        RWO            local-path     143m
    data-odf-cluster-kafka-2           Bound    pvc-5b6cc835-529a-4265-9a42-b46403fbe795   2Gi        RWO            local-path     143m
    data-odf-cluster-zookeeper-0       Bound    pvc-5f505af1-077b-438b-a9fb-3974a7dae9d7   2Gi        RWO            local-path     143m
    data-odf-cluster-zookeeper-1       Bound    pvc-5177af7e-6cc9-4993-bcad-42ce5a422fdc   2Gi

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with strimzi installed or the issue environment reproducible.
